response: The chef who is the owner of a Japanese restaurant in the Tribeca neighborhood and also owns two Bar Masas in New York and Nevada is Masa Takayama. He is the chef and owner of Masa, a three-Michelin-starred Japanese and sushi restaurant in Manhattan, New York City, and also owns Bar Masa, with two locations: one adjacent to his New York City restaurant and one in the Aria Resort & Casino on the Las Vegas Strip.
